closeRule: A phase closes only when BOTH trackA and trackB are status=done with an evidence path.

phases.title: Discovery, baseline capture & anti-amnesia spine
phases.notes: Baseline green except pre-existing mapShellPrimitives failure (MAP_PRIMARY_ACTIVITY_ORDER drift; fix in p04). Draw-open bug reproduced. p01 policy test must scan MAP_RADIUS.full. Env: run no-Tailwind via 'pwsh -File scripts/check-no-tailwind-centerpanel.ps1'.

phases.title: Status-language & de-roundification token foundation

trackA.title: Badge policy test + calm status tokens

phases.notes: Tokens calmed (no green/red fills); MAP_RADIUS.badge added; mapBadgePolicy.test.ts created. Round backlog = ROUND_TOKEN_ALLOWLIST (16) + ROUND_LITERAL_ALLOWLIST (4) in the policy test; p03 shrinks STATUS shapes only. Full map suite 830/831 (only pre-existing mapShellPrimitives fail).

phases.title: Badge cleanup — right dock & dock frame
phases.notes: Right-dock status chips now require live panelStatus; no fabricated ready/Primary tier chip. Visual pair: p02-right-dock-clean.png and p02-right-dock-condition.png.

phases.title: Badge cleanup — workspaces, scene strips, tables (global)
phases.notes: Literal round-radius allowlist is empty. Remaining MAP_RADIUS.full entries are documented non-status affordances only. Visual set: p03-problems-panel.png, p03-review-timeline.png, p03-attribute-table.png, p03-style-workspace.png, p03-scene-strip.png.

phases.title: Dock-visibility state unification

trackA.title: Converge legacy booleans onto route model

phases.notes: Right-dock route model is the single source of truth: showSidebar/showDrawPanel/showMeasurePanel are pure route projections (deriveContextualToolPanelVisibility) with thin route-dispatch setter wrappers (optimistic ref). Racing draw effect + getActiveRightDockPanel second derivation removed; draw is a floating-modal route (no rail) and pins/draw are excluded from MapRightDockHost. Full map suite 840/840 (the old mapShellPrimitives activity-order baseline fail is fixed). Parity set: p04-parity-{draw,measure,pins,scientificqa}.png.

phases.title: Drawing first-click open fix + topbar wiring

trackA.title: Open on first click + tool wiring + regression test

phases.notes: Root cause: post-p04 the topbar Draw command opened the 'draw' route but seeded NO tool (activeDrawTool=null → empty Select state), so first click looked dead. Fix: new pure helper mapDrawToolPreferences.ts (DEFAULT_DRAW_TOOL='polygon', resolveDrawToolOnOpen keep-active→last-used→default, never null); handleToggleDrawPanel opens via handleSetDrawTool seeding the resolved tool; handleSetDrawTool records last-used in a session ref. No showDrawPanel boolean, no localStorage/new store, MapDrawingManager not forked. Gates: map-drawing-tools+map-docking 72/72, draw-wiring 31/31, typecheck PASS, capture spec 1 passed. Visual: p05-draw-first-click.png, p05-draw-polygon.png.

phases.title: Drawing premium modal redesign
phases.notes: Tool rail + status + feature list moved from Core inline markup into MapDrawingManager presentation='modal' + new MapDrawingManager.module.css; MapDialogShell reused for focus/Escape/focus-return (no new focus-trap hook). New pure helpers in mapDrawToolPreferences.ts: MODAL_DRAW_TOOL_RAIL, getNextDrawToolRailIndex (roving-tabindex arrow nav), isDrawAoiActionDisabled (footer rule). ModalDrawToolRail = role=toolbar + aria-pressed + roving tabindex + arrow nav. Footer hierarchy: Fetch data primary (filled accent) / Add as layer secondary (ghost) / 3D buildings tertiary (borderless), right-aligned meta; handlers unchanged (p07/p08 depend). Empty state via GisEmptyState; entrance via motion.module.css panelIn (reduced-motion respected). Tests: map-drawing-tools 70/70, docking+routes 20/20, typecheck+lint PASS. a11y audit does NOT cover the draw modal (gap noted; covered by Track A unit tests). Env: cdn.playwright.dev blocked + playwright wants chromium 1217 but only 1194 provisioned -> capture spec pinned executablePath to /opt/pw-browsers/chromium-1194/chrome-linux/chrome.

phases.title: Rectangle AOI → fetch real data in bounds
phases.notes: Footer 'Fetch data' now runs a real bounds-clipped fetch (handleFetchAoiData) instead of only opening the dispatch dialog. New pure helpers in mapExplorerSpatialHelpers.ts: resolveAoiFetchBounds (getFeatureBounds+mergeBounds, lon/lat extent only — CRS-safe) and buildAoiFetchResult (filterFeatureCollectionToBounds → derived OverlayLayerConfig sourceKind:'derived', provenance method 'AOI fetch (bounds clip)', generatedAt, sourceLayerIds; or honest 'empty'=residual_gap / 'no-source'=environment_dependent, never a fake layer). Core handler resolves queryable geojson sources via resolveFeatureCollection, calls setMapViewRestriction(bounds,true) to AOI-scope subsequent loads, publishes via addOverlayLayer, fits bounds, records a review event. Flow Dispatch dialog untouched (still the confirmation surface for analysis routing via the map context menu; AOI still feeds it — p08 owns analysis). IMPORTANT FIX during impl: initial handler placement caused a 'Cannot access fitToBounds before initialization' TDZ ReferenceError that crashed <MapExplorerModal> on mount — relocated handleFetchAoiData to after fitToBounds. Gates: map-drawing-aoi-data 9, map-drawing-tools 87, full map suite 870/870 (84 files), typecheck PASS, eslint PASS. Visual: p07-aoi-fetch.png (Draw modal + AOI + Fetch data primary), p07-aoi-result-layer.png (derived 'AOI fetch · Study area AOI (4)' layer: 6 source features → 4 clipped inside AOI, success toast). Sources: real = whatever queryable vector layers are loaded (imported/derived); environment_dependent when none loaded/resolvable; residual_gap when sources exist but none intersect. Env: pwsh unavailable (no-Tailwind guard not runnable; TS-only changes, no className); chromium pinned to /opt/pw-browsers/chromium-1194.

phases.title: Right dock → draggable/resizable floating modal shell
Right dock single-click open + state cleanup
Status bar premium VS Code interactions
Final RC gate + visual QA sweep + archive
